parameters.query:
DELETE FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'vehicle';

WITH norm_to_vehicle AS (
  SELECT sn.id AS norm_id, v.id AS vehicle_id
  FROM datap4k_ships_norm sn
  JOIN datap4k_vehicle_links vl ON vl.id = sn.vehicle_link_id
  JOIN vehicles v ON v.id = vl.vehicle_id
),
purchase_locs AS (
  SELECT
    vpp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_name',     vpp.terminal_name,
        'terminal_code',     vpp.terminal_code,
        'city_name',         vpp.city_name,
        'planet_name',       vpp.planet_name,
        'orbit_name',        vpp.orbit_name,
        'star_system_name',  vpp.star_system_name,
        'price_buy',         vpp.price_buy,
        'price_buy_avg',     vpp.price_buy_avg,
        'price_buy_min',     vpp.price_buy_min,
        'price_buy_max',     vpp.price_buy_max,
        'terminal_is_player_owned', vpp.terminal_is_player_owned,
        'game_version',      vpp.game_version
      ) ORDER BY vpp.terminal_name
    ) AS purchase_data
  FROM vehicle_purchase_prices vpp
  GROUP BY vpp.vehicle_id
),
rental_locs AS (
  SELECT
    vrp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_name',     vrp.terminal_name,
        'terminal_code',     vrp.terminal_code,
        'city_name',         vrp.city_name,
        'planet_name',       vrp.planet_name,
        'orbit_name',        vrp.orbit_name,
        'star_system_name',  vrp.star_system_name,
        'price_rent',        vrp.price_rent,
        'price_rent_avg',    vrp.price_rent_avg,
        'price_rent_min',    vrp.price_rent_min,
        'price_rent_max',    vrp.price_rent_max,
        'terminal_is_player_owned', vrp.terminal_is_player_owned,
        'game_version',      vrp.game_version
      ) ORDER BY vrp.terminal_name
    ) AS rental_data
  FROM vehicle_rental_prices vrp
  GROUP BY vrp.vehicle_id
),
store_prices_agg AS (
  SELECT
    vsp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_object_agg(
      vsp.currency,
      jsonb_build_object(
        'price',              vsp.price,
        'price_package',      vsp.price_package,
        'price_warbond',      vsp.price_warbond,
        'price_concierge',    vsp.price_concierge,
        'on_sale',            vsp.on_sale,
        'on_sale_package',    vsp.on_sale_package,
        'on_sale_warbond',    vsp.on_sale_warbond,
        'on_sale_concierge',  vsp.on_sale_concierge,
        'game_version',       vsp.game_version
      )
    ) AS store_data
  FROM vehicle_store_prices vsp
  GROUP BY vsp.vehicle_id
),
dp4k_shop_data AS (
  SELECT
    sn.id AS norm_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'class_name',         si.class_name,
        'category',           si.category,
        'buy_auec',           si.buy_auec,
        'sell_auec',          si.sell_auec,
        'shop',               si.shop,
        'location',           si.location,
        'terminal_source_id', si.terminal_source_id
      ) ORDER BY si.class_name
    ) AS shops_data
  FROM datap4k_ships_norm sn
  JOIN datap4k_shop_inventory si
    ON si.item_raw_id = sn.raw_id AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_ships_raw'
  GROUP BY sn.id
),
variant_list AS (
  SELECT
    v.variant_of AS base_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',        v.id,
        'slug',      v.slug,
        'name',      v.name,
        'variant',   v.variant,
        'source_id', v.source_id,
        'uex_id',    v.uex_id
      ) ORDER BY v.name
    ) AS variants,
    string_agg(v.name, ' ') AS variant_names,
    string_agg(replace(v.slug, '-', ' '), ' ') AS variant_slug_words
  FROM datap4k_ships_norm v
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY v.variant_of
),
base_info AS (
  SELECT
    v.id       AS variant_id,
    b.slug     AS base_slug,
    b.name     AS base_name
  FROM datap4k_ships_norm v
  JOIN datap4k_ships_norm b ON b.id = v.variant_of
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
),
esc_by_dp4k AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (datap4k_slug) id, entity_type, datap4k_slug, uex_slug, rsi_slug, source, verified
  FROM entity_slug_crossref
  WHERE entity_type = 'ship' AND datap4k_slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY datap4k_slug, id
),
esc_by_uex AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (uex_slug) id, entity_type, datap4k_slug, uex_slug, rsi_slug, source, verified
  FROM entity_slug_crossref
  WHERE entity_type = 'ship' AND uex_slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY uex_slug, id
),
loadout_agg AS (
  SELECT
    sub.ship_norm_id,
    jsonb_object_agg(sub.port_section, sub.items) AS loadout
  FROM (
    SELECT
      sln.ship_norm_id,
      sln.port_section,
      jsonb_agg(
        jsonb_build_object(
          'class_name',      sln.class_name,
          'item_slug',       sln.item_slug,
          'item_uex_id',     sln.item_uex_id,
          'item_norm_table', sln.item_norm_table,
          'name',            COALESCE(wn.name,  cn.name,  sln.item_name),
          'manufacturer',    COALESCE(wn.manufacturer, cn.manufacturer),
          'size',            COALESCE(wn.size,  cn.size,  sln.item_size),
          'type',            COALESCE(wn.category, cn.type, sln.item_type),
          'sub_type',        COALESCE(wn.subtype,  cn.sub_type),
          'grade',           COALESCE(cn.grade, sln.item_grade),
          'category',        sln.item_category,
          'component_ref',   sln.component_ref,
          'total_damage',    wn.total_damage,
          'fire_rate_rpm',   wn.fire_rate_rpm
        ) ORDER BY sln.class_name
      ) AS items
    FROM datap4k_ship_loadout_norm sln
    LEFT JOIN datap4k_weapons_norm wn
      ON wn.id = sln.item_norm_id AND sln.item_norm_table = 'datap4k_weapons_norm'
    LEFT JOIN datap4k_components_norm cn
      ON cn.id = sln.item_norm_id AND sln.item_norm_table = 'datap4k_components_norm'
    WHERE sln.ship_norm_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY sln.ship_norm_id, sln.port_section
  ) sub
  GROUP BY sub.ship_norm_id
),
loaners_agg AS (
  SELECT
    v.id AS vehicle_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',        lv.slug,
        'name',        lv.name,
        'entity_type', CASE WHEN lv.is_ground_vehicle THEN 'ground_vehicle' ELSE 'vehicle' END
      ) ORDER BY lv.name
    ) AS loaners
  FROM vehicles v
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT unnest(string_to_array(
      v.metadata->'raw'->>'ids_vehicles_loaners', ','
    ))::integer AS loaner_uex_id
  ) ids
  JOIN vehicles lv ON lv.source_id = 'vehicles:' || ids.loaner_uex_id::text
  WHERE v.metadata->'raw'->>'ids_vehicles_loaners' IS NOT NULL
    AND v.metadata->'raw'->>'ids_vehicles_loaners' NOT IN ('', '0')
  GROUP BY v.id
),
rsi_matrix AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) id, slug, production_status, focus, size, url,
    image_store_large, image_slideshow, min_crew, max_crew,
    height_m, length_m, cargo_scu, manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name,
    description, images, compiled
  FROM rsi_ship_matrix_norm
  WHERE slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY slug, id
),
rsi_fallback_map AS (
  -- For vehicles with no direct RSI match, find best RSI entry by:
  -- 1. Direct slug match (handles synthetic rows like orig-600i)
  -- 2. Slug prefix match (handles special editions: anvl-carrack-bis2950 → anvl-carrack)
  -- Longest/most-specific match wins.
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (vehicle_slug)
    vehicle_slug,
    rsn.id, rsn.slug, rsn.production_status, rsn.focus, rsn.size, rsn.url,
    rsn.image_store_large, rsn.image_slideshow, rsn.min_crew, rsn.max_crew,
    rsn.height_m, rsn.length_m, rsn.cargo_scu, rsn.manufacturer_code,
    rsn.manufacturer_name, rsn.description, rsn.images, rsn.compiled
  FROM (
    SELECT slug AS vehicle_slug FROM vehicles
    WHERE is_ground_vehicle = false OR is_ground_vehicle IS NULL
  ) all_v
  JOIN rsi_ship_matrix_norm rsn ON (
    all_v.vehicle_slug = rsn.slug
    OR all_v.vehicle_slug LIKE rsn.slug || '-%'
  )
  WHERE rsn.slug IS NOT NULL AND rsn.images IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY
    vehicle_slug,
    CASE WHEN all_v.vehicle_slug = rsn.slug THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    length(rsn.slug) DESC
)

-- Part A: datap4k-backed ships
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  sn.slug,
  'vehicle',
  sn.name,
  sn.manufacturer,
  sn.career,
  sn.uex_id,
  sn.is_base_variant,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                    sn.name,
    'variant',                 sn.variant,
    'manufacturer',            sn.manufacturer,
    'role',                    sn.role,
    'career',                  sn.career,
    'crew',                    sn.crew,
    'hull_hp',                 sn.hull_hp,
    'cargo_scu',               sn.cargo_scu,
    'max_speed_mps',           sn.max_speed_mps,
    'scm_speed_mps',           sn.scm_speed_mps,
    'ab_forward_mps',          sn.ab_forward_mps,
    'ab_reverse_mps',          sn.ab_reverse_mps,
    'ab_regen',                sn.ab_regen,
    'ab_capacitor',            sn.ab_capacitor,
    'insurance_claim_min',     sn.insurance_claim_min,
    'insurance_expedite_auec', sn.insurance_expedite_auec,
    'weapon_port_count',       sn.weapon_port_count,
    'system_component_count',  sn.system_component_count,
    'shops',                   sn.shops,
    'source_id',               sn.source_id,
    'source_slug',             sn.source_slug,
    'uex_id',                  sn.uex_id,
    'uex_scu',                 v.scu,
    'uex_crew_min',            v.crew_min,
    'uex_crew_max',            v.crew_max,
    'uex_pad_type',            v.pad_type,
    'uex_name',                v.name,
    'uex_name_full',           v.name_full,
    'uex_company_name',        v.company_name,
    'uex_company_uex_id',      v.company_uex_id,
    'uex_is_concept',          v.is_concept,
    'uex_is_quantum_capable',  v.is_quantum_capable,
    'uex_game_version',        v.game_version,
    'uex_source_id',           v.source_id,
    'uex_metadata',            v.metadata
  ) || jsonb_build_object(
    'uex_slug',                el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',          el.match_field,
    'is_base_variant',         sn.is_base_variant,
    'variant_of',              sn.variant_of,
    'base_slug',               bi.base_slug,
    'base_name',               bi.base_name,
    'variants',                COALESCE(vl.variants, '[]'::jsonb),
    'loaners',                 COALESCE(lo.loaners, '[]'::jsonb),
    'purchase_locations',      COALESCE(pl.purchase_data,   '[]'::jsonb),
    'rental_locations',        COALESCE(rl.rental_data,     '[]'::jsonb),
    'store_price',             sp.store_data,
    'sold_at_dp4k',            COALESCE(dsd.shops_data,     '[]'::jsonb),
    'description',             rn.description,
    'loadout',                 la.loadout,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END,
    'rsi', CASE
      WHEN rn.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',              rn.slug,
        'production_status', rn.production_status,
        'focus',             rn.focus,
        'size',              rn.size,
        'url',               rn.url,
        'image_store_large', rn.image_store_large,
        'image_slideshow',   rn.image_slideshow,
        'min_crew',          rn.min_crew,
        'max_crew',          rn.max_crew,
        'height_m',          rn.height_m,
        'length_m',          rn.length_m,
        'cargo_scu',         rn.cargo_scu,
        'manufacturer_code', rn.manufacturer_code,
        'manufacturer_name', rn.manufacturer_name,
        'description',       rn.description,
        'images',            rn.images,
        'compiled',          rn.compiled
      )
      WHEN rfm.vehicle_slug IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',              rfm.slug,
        'production_status', rfm.production_status,
        'focus',             rfm.focus,
        'size',              rfm.size,
        'url',               rfm.url,
        'image_store_large', rfm.image_store_large,
        'image_slideshow',   rfm.image_slideshow,
        'min_crew',          rfm.min_crew,
        'max_crew',          rfm.max_crew,
        'height_m',          rfm.height_m,
        'length_m',          rfm.length_m,
        'cargo_scu',         rfm.cargo_scu,
        'manufacturer_code', rfm.manufacturer_code,
        'manufacturer_name', rfm.manufacturer_name,
        'description',       rfm.description,
        'images',            rfm.images,
        'compiled',          rfm.compiled
      )
      ELSE NULL
    END,
    'modules', COALESCE((
      SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
        'slug', m_slug, 'name', m_name, 'entity_type', m_etype
      ) ORDER BY m_name)
      FROM (
        SELECT addon.slug AS m_slug, addon.name AS m_name, 'vehicle'::text AS m_etype
        FROM vehicles addon
        WHERE (addon.metadata->'raw'->>'id_parent')::int = sn.uex_id
          AND addon.metadata->'raw'->>'is_addon' = '1'
          AND (addon.is_ground_vehicle = false OR addon.is_ground_vehicle IS NULL)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cn.slug, cn.name, 'component'::text
        FROM datap4k_components_norm cn
        JOIN ship_module_map smm
          ON smm.ship_slug = sn.slug
         AND cn.slug LIKE smm.module_prefix || '%'
        WHERE cn.type = 'Module'
          AND cn.uex_category_name = 'Ship Modules'
      ) mods
    ), '[]'::jsonb)
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(sn.name, '')           || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(sn.manufacturer, '')   || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(sn.role, '')           || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(sn.career, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(v.name_full, '')       || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(v.company_name, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(vl.variant_names, '')  || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(vl.variant_slug_words, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM datap4k_ships_norm sn
LEFT JOIN norm_to_vehicle ntv  ON ntv.norm_id   = sn.id
LEFT JOIN vehicles v            ON v.id          = ntv.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id       = sn.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN purchase_locs pl      ON pl.vehicle_id = ntv.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN rental_locs rl        ON rl.vehicle_id = ntv.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN store_prices_agg sp   ON sp.vehicle_id = ntv.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN dp4k_shop_data dsd    ON dsd.norm_id   = sn.id
LEFT JOIN variant_list vl       ON vl.base_id    = sn.id
LEFT JOIN base_info bi          ON bi.variant_id = sn.id
LEFT JOIN loaners_agg lo        ON lo.vehicle_id = ntv.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN esc_by_dp4k esc       ON esc.datap4k_slug = sn.slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_matrix rn         ON rn.slug = esc.rsi_slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_fallback_map rfm  ON rfm.vehicle_slug = sn.slug AND rn.id IS NULL
LEFT JOIN loadout_agg la        ON la.ship_norm_id = sn.id
WHERE sn.is_base_variant = true

UNION ALL

-- Part B: UEX-only ships (no datap4k match)
SELECT
  v.slug,
  'vehicle',
  v.name,
  v.company_name,
  NULL,
  split_part(v.source_id, ':', 2)::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                   v.name,
    'uex_id',                 split_part(v.source_id, ':', 2)::integer,
    'uex_scu',                v.scu,
    'uex_crew_min',           v.crew_min,
    'uex_crew_max',           v.crew_max,
    'uex_pad_type',           v.pad_type,
    'uex_name',               v.name,
    'uex_name_full',          v.name_full,
    'uex_company_name',       v.company_name,
    'uex_company_uex_id',     v.company_uex_id,
    'uex_is_concept',         v.is_concept,
    'uex_is_quantum_capable', v.is_quantum_capable,
    'uex_game_version',       v.game_version,
    'uex_source_id',          v.source_id,
    'uex_metadata',           v.metadata,
    'source_id',              v.source_id,
    'is_base_variant',        TRUE,
    'purchase_locations',     COALESCE(pl.purchase_data,   '[]'::jsonb),
    'rental_locations',       COALESCE(rl.rental_data,     '[]'::jsonb),
    'store_price',            sp.store_data,
    'sold_at_dp4k',           '[]'::jsonb,
    'description',            rn.description,
    'loadout',                NULL::jsonb,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END,
    'rsi', CASE
      WHEN rn.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',              rn.slug,
        'production_status', rn.production_status,
        'focus',             rn.focus,
        'size',              rn.size,
        'url',               rn.url,
        'image_store_large', rn.image_store_large,
        'image_slideshow',   rn.image_slideshow,
        'min_crew',          rn.min_crew,
        'max_crew',          rn.max_crew,
        'height_m',          rn.height_m,
        'length_m',          rn.length_m,
        'cargo_scu',         rn.cargo_scu,
        'manufacturer_code', rn.manufacturer_code,
        'manufacturer_name', rn.manufacturer_name,
        'description',       rn.description,
        'images',            rn.images,
        'compiled',          rn.compiled
      )
      WHEN rfm.vehicle_slug IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',              rfm.slug,
        'production_status', rfm.production_status,
        'focus',             rfm.focus,
        'size',              rfm.size,
        'url',               rfm.url,
        'image_store_large', rfm.image_store_large,
        'image_slideshow',   rfm.image_slideshow,
        'min_crew',          rfm.min_crew,
        'max_crew',          rfm.max_crew,
        'height_m',          rfm.height_m,
        'length_m',          rfm.length_m,
        'cargo_scu',         rfm.cargo_scu,
        'manufacturer_code', rfm.manufacturer_code,
        'manufacturer_name', rfm.manufacturer_name,
        'description',       rfm.description,
        'images',            rfm.images,
        'compiled',          rfm.compiled
      )
      ELSE NULL
    END,
    'modules', COALESCE((
      SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
        'slug', m_slug, 'name', m_name, 'entity_type', m_etype
      ) ORDER BY m_name)
      FROM (
        SELECT addon.slug AS m_slug, addon.name AS m_name, 'vehicle'::text AS m_etype
        FROM vehicles addon
        WHERE (addon.metadata->'raw'->>'id_parent')::int = split_part(v.source_id, ':', 2)::int
          AND addon.metadata->'raw'->>'is_addon' = '1'
          AND (addon.is_ground_vehicle = false OR addon.is_ground_vehicle IS NULL)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cn.slug, cn.name, 'component'::text
        FROM datap4k_components_norm cn
        JOIN ship_module_map smm
          ON smm.ship_slug = v.slug
         AND cn.slug LIKE smm.module_prefix || '%'
        WHERE cn.type = 'Module'
          AND cn.uex_category_name = 'Ship Modules'
      ) mods
    ), '[]'::jsonb)
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(v.name, '')          || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(v.name_full, '')     || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(v.company_name, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) *
  FROM vehicles
  WHERE (is_ground_vehicle = false OR is_ground_vehicle IS NULL)
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT vl.vehicle_id
    FROM datap4k_vehicle_links vl
    JOIN datap4k_ships_norm sn ON sn.vehicle_link_id = vl.id
    WHERE vl.vehicle_id IS NOT NULL
  )
  AND slug NOT IN (
    SELECT slug FROM datap4k_ships_norm WHERE is_base_variant = true
  )
  ORDER BY slug, source_id
) v
LEFT JOIN purchase_locs pl      ON pl.vehicle_id = v.id
LEFT JOIN rental_locs rl        ON rl.vehicle_id = v.id
LEFT JOIN store_prices_agg sp   ON sp.vehicle_id = v.id
LEFT JOIN esc_by_uex esc        ON esc.uex_slug = v.slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_matrix rn         ON rn.slug = esc.rsi_slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_fallback_map rfm  ON rfm.vehicle_slug = v.slug AND rn.id IS NULL

ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
